overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a post-apocalyptic video game. The player moves through an abandoned Soviet-era building interior before transitioning to a toxic outdoor swamp with a large sinkhole. The environment features overcast lighting, muted desaturated colors, and industrial decay.

agents.ego_description: slowly moving through the derelict room, panning left toward the doorway while observing the decayed interior

entered.detail: tall multi-paned windows letting in diffused daylight, showing overcast sky outside
row of tall metal lockers against the back wall
upended and damaged wooden school desks scattered across the floor
small blue metal cabinet with drawers against the left wall
rubble, papers, and broken materials covering the concrete floor
dark open doorway leading to an adjacent room or corridor

segments.scene_description: The player explores a dimly lit abandoned classroom or office space. Broken wooden desks and metal lockers line the walls, while debris litters the concrete floor. Large windows on the right provide the only natural light as the camera slowly pans left toward a dark doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: contaminated wetland with toxic sinkhole near industrial facility

events.description: hard cut from indoor abandoned building to outdoor toxic swamp environment
camera begins circling around the right side of the sinkhole, changing viewing angle

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking along the crater rim, surveying the toxic green water and the abandoned facility on the hill ahead

entered.detail: large irregular sinkhole filled with murky green contaminated water
multi-story concrete industrial building situated on a grassy hill
single pine tree leaning over the crater edge in the foreground
distant industrial structures and power lines visible through the haze
stagnant greenish water filling the sinkhole with visible pollution
eroded rocky edge of the crater with exposed soil and roots

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a desolate outdoor wetland. The player navigates the edge of a toxic sinkhole filled with green contaminated water, moving past a leaning pine tree toward an abandoned concrete building on a distant hill. Industrial ruins are visible through the hazy overcast sky as the camera circles the crater rim.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic interior of a decaying building into a vast, toxic wasteland. It begins in a dimly lit classroom or office space, panning past broken wooden desks and metal lockers strewn across a debris-covered concrete floor. As the camera moves away from the natural light of the side windows and passes through a dark doorway, the scene abruptly opens into a desolate outdoor wetland. The perspective then shifts to navigate the rim of a massive sinkhole filled with glowing green contaminated water, passing a leaning pine tree while circling the crater. Finally, the view expands across the hazy, overcast landscape toward industrial ruins and an abandoned concrete building perched on a distant hill.
